pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in export_result.sh and task description
Verified from verifier.py logic and sample_project.xml base calendar configuration
MSPDI schema mapping inferred from sample_project.xml where DayType 7 is Saturday (DayType 1 is Sunday)
Task description and standard MSPDI calendar weekday mapping
Verified against task description and expected values in verifier.py logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the 'Standard' base calendar of a synthetic sample project file to make Saturday a working day. The file must be saved as an MSPDI XML to '/home/ga/Projects/crunch_schedule.xml'. In the MSPDI XML schema, Saturday corresponds to DayType 7. The exact working times that must be added for Saturday are 08:00:00 to 12:00:00 and 13:00:00 to 17:00:00.
